chunks.text: 2025-26 Special Events - EECS at Berkeley. Professor Andy Neureuther (center) and former students. Celebration of Andy Neureuther. Join us for a special event celebrating Andy Neureuther’s influential career in optical lithography and semiconductor technology. Andy will share stories and memories from his decades of groundbreaking work and lasting impact on the community. See event photos.

Recipients of the EECS Outstanding TA Award and the EECS Chairs. Student Awards 2025. Each year the EECS Student Awards Committee selects winners for each of our department awards, many based on nominations gathered from EECS students, faculty and staff. See the Winners.
